stemHtml: Sometimes, a single Flight Information Region (FIR) is delineated to include upper airspace within the lateral limits of a number of lower FIRs. Why is this desirable?

options.a: To limit the amount of FIRs a high-flying aircraft must operate in.
options.b: To limit the amount of FIRs a low-flying aircraft must operate in.
options.c: To limit the amount of VHF frequency changes for low-flying aircraft.
options.d: To limit the amount of VLF frequency changes for high-flying aircraft.
